description.para: APLIC register offsets as defined in the AIA specification.

briefdescription.para: Domain configuration register offset.
Source configuration registers base offset.
Set interrupt pending bitmap base offset.
Set interrupt pending by number register offset.
Clear interrupt pending bitmap base offset.
Clear interrupt pending by number register offset.
Set interrupt enable bitmap base offset.
Set interrupt enable by number register offset.
Clear interrupt enable bitmap base offset.
Clear interrupt enable by number register offset.
MSI address configuration register offset.
MSI address configuration high register offset.
Supervisor MSI address configuration register offset.
Supervisor MSI address configuration high register offset.
Generate MSI register offset.
Target registers base offset.

description.para: Bit definitions for the APLIC domain configuration register.

briefdescription.para: Interrupt enable bit in domaincfg.
Delivery mode bit in domaincfg (1=MSI mode)
Big endian bit in domaincfg.

description.para: Bit field definitions for MSIADDRCFGH register used by APLIC to calculate per-hart MSI target addresses.

briefdescription.para: Lock bit position in MSIADDRCFGH.
Higher Hart Index Shift field position.
Higher Hart Index Shift field mask.
Lower Hart Index Shift field position.
Lower Hart Index Shift field mask.
Higher Hart Index Width field position.
Higher Hart Index Width field mask.
Lower Hart Index Width field position.
Lower Hart Index Width field mask.
Base address PPN field mask (upper address bits)

description.para: Bit field definitions for source configuration registers.

briefdescription.para: Delegate bit position in sourcecfg.
Source mode field mask (bits 2:0)
Source mode: inactive.
Source mode: detached (delegated to child domain)
Source mode: rising edge triggered.
Source mode: falling edge triggered.
Source mode: active high level triggered.
Source mode: active low level triggered.

description.para: Bit field definitions for TARGET registers (MSI routing).

briefdescription.para: Hart index field shift in TARGET register.
Hart index field mask (14-bit, bits 31:18)
MSI delivery mode bit (0=DMSI, 1=MMSI)
External Interrupt Identity field mask (11-bit, bits 10:0)

description.para: Bit field definitions for software-triggered MSI generation.

briefdescription.para: Hart index field shift in GENMSI register.
Hart index field mask (14-bit, bits 31:18)
Context/Guest field shift (bits 17:13)
Context field mask (5-bit, for DMSI)
Busy bit (read-only status)
MSI delivery mode (0=DMSI, 1=MMSI)
External Interrupt Identity field mask (11-bit, bits 10:0)
Calculate sourcecfg register offset for a source.

simplesect.para: Register offset for the source's configuration register

briefdescription.para: Calculate target register offset for a source.

simplesect.para: Register offset for the source's target register

briefdescription.para: Get the APLIC device instance.

detaileddescription.para: Returns the device structure for the APLIC driver.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the APLIC device, or NULL if not available

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable the APLIC domain.

detaileddescription.para: Controls the interrupt enable bit in the domain configuration register.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable the domain, false to disable

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, unsigned int src, unsigned int sm)
memberdef.name: riscv_aplic_config_src

briefdescription.para: Configure an interrupt source mode.

detaileddescription.para: Sets the trigger mode for an interrupt source (edge/level, polarity).

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, unsigned int src, bool enable)
memberdef.name: riscv_aplic_enable_src

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable an interrupt source.

detaileddescription.para: Controls whether the specified interrupt source can generate interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable, false to disable

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

briefdescription.para: Get the number of interrupt sources.

detaileddescription.para: Returns the number of interrupt sources supported by the APLIC.

briefdescription.para: Enable an interrupt source (convenience wrapper)

detaileddescription.para: Enables the specified interrupt source using the default APLIC device.

briefdescription.para: Disable an interrupt source (convenience wrapper)

detaileddescription.para: Disables the specified interrupt source using the default APLIC device.

briefdescription.para: RISC-V APLIC (Advanced Platform-Level Interrupt Controller) driver API.

detaileddescription.para: This header provides the API and register definitions for the RISC-V Advanced Platform-Level Interrupt Controller (APLIC). The APLIC is part of the RISC-V Advanced Interrupt Architecture (AIA) and supports both MSI and direct delivery modes.
